title: Quiet Fortress
lyrics: Oh, yeah, just come, come along with me You'll see the different fires and the different desires of life sent light, yeah, baby, come, come along with me It's ultra hard, yeah, but you'll feel free Sometimes the dark get you down, get you up Sometimes the light get you down, get you up It's all a matter of your perspective of you and how you take in the new view Come along with me There's no reason to be afraid, I got you Come along with me I'll show you the different avenues Maybe you haven't heard about this moment, Maybe you haven't even thought of this perspective But you can find a little bit of you in everything you look down to The money walls down through the corridors into the tunnels and out of the night You'll see life different, baby, if you just come along with me Don't be afraid to run, no, baby, come along with me And if it gets too hard, don't be afraid to run Pick you up on the back of the left fold Tell you that it was just all the trouble That kept us together so we can feel the base inside of our heart and feel free, baby, but Come along with me You'll find me Yeah, come along with me You'll hear me I'll tell you there's different skies above us, different stars that you see when you've been through the night, baby, come along with me Oh, come along and you'll see you Come a little bit closer to you In that morning view You'll see the mirror reflecting inside of the night that you thought you've been through, baby, I know you We'll make it through the night inside to me if you see You need to find all the dreams inside of you but come along with me We'll go through it all together, baby, yeah Come along, just come along Come along with me You'll see you You'll find you You'll find that it's only you It's only you You'll find it's only you It's only you It's only you
